race.comment: SENTIMENTAL LEGEND (2) returns to the Grant & Alana Williams stable on the back of a sound return over 1400m. He was solid late in the race there as the $1.70 elect after settling midfield. Straight out to 1650m looks ideal and the winkers should spark him up a touch. Can get back to winning ways here. TAHNI TALK (3) flew home in strong splits late in the race to score by 0.5L first-up over 1400m on the Scarpside at Pinjarra. He looks better placed out to this trip now, though he may end up a long way back in the run again. Watch for him flying late in the race. TASSORT WE WANT (4) stuck on well from the back when 150-1 over 1300m here last time out. He was solid late in the race there and getting up in trip now can see him improve third-up into the campaign. Can make his presence felt. MYZOOM (11) turned in a better run last time out and can be in the finish again. HIGHLY SPOKEN (1) won't be far away despite the tricky draw.
